message:
fix(session-list): correct phase sorting and Escape key handling

- Fix phase sorting: "desc" now shows most-progressed sessions first
  (complete → intake) instead of least-progressed first
- Fix modal Escape key: Use useEffect with window event listener
  instead of broken onKeyDown on backdrop div
- Clean up backdrop div: Use aria-hidden instead of role="button"

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
